items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
items.summary: **Ettin Reranker Family** introduces specialized retrieval-ranking models improving LLM accuracy in financial document processing and knowledge extraction—critical for ECL model validation, regulatory reporting automation, and reducing hallucination risk in credit decisioning workflows. Deployed at scale, reranking improves retrieval precision in unstructured data pipelines, directly enhancing PD/LGD calibration robustness and enabling real-time anomaly detection in transaction monitoring systems.

Can Honasa shares rally up to 57% after strong Q4 show? Jefferies, CLSA & two other brokerages weigh in
items.content: Honasa Consumer shares surged over 11% on Friday after a strong Q4 FY26 performance, with brokerages including Jefferies, CLSA, ICICI Securities and JM Financial turning more optimistic. Jefferies sees up to 57% upside, citing robust multi-channel growth, improving margins and stronger execution, while other brokerages also highlight rising traction across key brands and categories.

items.title: IT sector a contrarian opportunity at current valuations: Aditya Shah
items.content: Aditya Shah of Hercules Advisors identifies power, banking, chemicals, and real estate as promising sectors for long-term growth amidst global uncertainty. While cautious on EMS due to valuations, he sees potential in quick commerce players demonstrating disciplined execution and profitability, favoring Blinkit currently.
items.summary: **MACRO/MARKETS:** Rotation toward defensive, fundamentals-driven sectors (power, banking, chemicals) signals market repricing of duration risk and earnings quality; quick commerce profitability inflection challenges prior growth-at-any-cost thesis, reshaping emerging market consumer tech narratives.

items.title: De novo design of miniproteins targeting GPCRs
Did a boy’s life-saving gene therapy cause his brain tumour?
Scientists discover a two-stage aging process that may cause cancer and arthritis
items.content: A new theory suggests many age-related diseases may actually start decades before symptoms appear. Researchers say early-life damage — from infections, injuries, or genetic mutations — can remain hidden until aging weakens the body’s ability to keep it under control. This could explain why conditions like cancer, osteoarthritis, and shingles suddenly emerge later in life.
items.summary:
**MACRO/MARKETS:** Two-stage aging mechanism validates long-tail disease risk pricing; reshapes pharma/biotech valuations (prevention focus), eldercare sector demand curves, and actuarial models underpinning life insurance/annuity liabilities across developed markets with aging demographics.

**CREDIT RISK:** Latent disease onset complicates IFRS 9 ECL longevity assumptions in life insurance/pension portfolios; PD/LGD models for healthcare lending require recalibration if early-life exposures (infections, genetic markers) become quantifiable risk drivers requiring forward-looking staging.

**AI/ML:** Early-damage biomarkers create new

items.title: Think you’re bad at languages? Experts say these 5 myths are to blame
items.content: Many people avoid learning a new language because they remember stressful grammar lessons or fear making mistakes. But language experts say communication, culture, and connection matter far more than perfection. Modern apps, entertainment, travel, and online communities have made learning easier, more social, and surprisingly fun.
items.summary: **BREAKTHROUGHS / EDTECH DISRUPTION**: Language-learning myths debunked by experts reveal AI-driven platforms (apps, gamified content, community) as scalable alternatives to traditional instruction—positioning edtech as high-growth sector with favorable unit economics and global TAM expansion, particularly in emerging markets seeking workforce upskilling.

items.title: JWST maps the weather on a hot gas giant 700 light-years away
items.content: The differences seen here could be throwing off how we study planetary atmospheres.
items.summary:
**MACRO/MARKETS & BREAKTHROUGHS:**
JWST's atmospheric mapping of exoplanets refines climate/weather modeling inputs, strengthening the scientific foundation for long-term commodity, energy transition, and climate-risk pricing—critical for macro asset allocation and ESG-linked portfolio positioning. Validates investment theses in climate-resilient infrastructure and green energy by improving predictive accuracy of planetary/terrestrial climate systems.

items.title: Show HN: Spec-Driven Development Workflow for Claude Code
items.content:
Spec Driven Development approach allows to squeeze more from coding agents thanks to few strong concepts:
- decomposition across two dimensions. first you generate specs in multiple steps (requirements, code analysis, design), than you split task into multiple subtasks and implement them one by one
- you clear context between every step - after spec generation and after subtask implementation. this helps keep cost low and context clear and focused which boost performance
- specs written to disk help with information persistency
- delivering specs layer by layer help to catch early when agent got you wrong
Repo with claude plugin for spec driven development: https://github.com/sermakarevich/sddw
Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48231575
Points: 11
# Comments: 2

- decomposition across two dimensions. first you generate specs in multiple steps (requirement...

items.title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
items.content: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.
items.summary:
**MACRO/MARKETS:** Autonomous vehicle regulatory friction expanding geographically signals slower-than-priced monetization timelines for AV operators; weather-handling gaps undermine "full self-driving" narratives and may compress addressable market assumptions in equity valuations.

**CREDIT RISK:** Operational risk materialization (systemic failure modes) in autonomous fleets warrants scenario stress-testing for lenders to AV/mobility OEMs; IFRS 9 forward-looking ECL models must embed technology adoption/deployment risk premiums beyond historical datasets.

**AI/ML:** Failure in edge-case weather detection exposes critical gaps in production ML model robustness; banking

items.title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
items.content: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again Friday.
items.summary: **MACRO/MARKETS & BREAKTHROUGHS:** SpaceX launch delay signals continued execution risk in commercial space infrastructure despite capital intensity; successful Starship V3 deployment critical to space economy thesis (satellite comms, lunar/Mars missions) underpinning long-duration structural growth in telecom, defense, and emerging space-tech equity valuations.
